success_outcomes.text: Together, they collect a b_tp_a_s, a couple b_tp_dl_p, an old b_mp_a_s and two b_tp_a_p. It should be a great patrol, returning with so much prey — but r_c is acting obnoxious and {PRONOUN/r_c/poss} siblings have little time or patience for it.

log.cats_from: cat_to acted obnoxious during a hunt and cat_from lost {PRONOUN/cat_from/poss} patience.

success_outcomes.text: r_c makes a dumb comment that accidentally cuts deep. {PRONOUN/r_c/poss/CAP} siblings work with {PRONOUN/r_c/object} long enough to bring back a great haul of prey — but no longer.

log.cats_from: cat_to's casual comment during a hunt hurt cat_from's feelings.

fail_outcomes.text: Today is just not their day.
The patrol tries to hunt, but r_c keeps stopping to duck behind bushes, until it's obvious that something is actually wrong. Eww.

What do they know about this herb's properties?
decline_text: They decide to focus on hunting and leave the herb collecting to the medicine cats.

success_outcomes.text: It's not their normal task, but they're all smart enough to value supporting the Clan's medicine cat den. The patrol brings the herbs back to camp, and they are put to good use.

log.cats_from: cat_from thought it was very considerate of cat_to to bring back some herbs during a hunting patrol.

success_outcomes.text: s_c carefully plucks some of the herbs and takes them back to the camp to be identified before the patrol goes to the trouble of collecting them, smartly deciding to get an informed opinion before committing the patrol.

log.cats_from: cat_from appreciated that cat_to checked with a medicine cat before gathering herbs on a hunting patrol.

fail_outcomes.text: The patrol brings the herbs back to camp, only to find out that while the herbs promote good gut health, they're not a rare resource. Still, c_n will be eating an extra healthy dinner tonight with the herbs sprinkled into their fresh-kill.

log.cats_from: Even though the herbs weren't medicinal, cat_from thought it was considerate of cat_to to gather them while the patrol hunted.

intro_text: Wind whips around p_l and r_c's pelts as they work their way up the cliffside. Above, the ledges are covered in gannets. A cacophony of calls heralds the parents' return to the bustling colony. The cats weave around the occupied nests, staying just out of reach of the brooding birds, in search of unguarded eggs.
decline_text: The wind gusts intensify, threatening to push the cats off the cliffside. It's too dangerous, and p_l orders the patrol to turn around.

success_outcomes.text: r_c spots a lone egg in an unattended kelp nest and clambers over. p_l keeps an eye out for its parent and notices a panicking gannet down in the water, unable to take off due to the high waves. The patrol snatches the egg and leaves promptly.

s_c finds a broken egg in an abandoned kelp nest, a bluish-black, featherless dead chick half-hanging out of the shell. s_c explains it was likely crushed by its inexperienced parents' feet while hatching. Perfect prey for c_n.

log.cats_from: cat_from was impressed by cat_to's knowledge of gannets while stealing their eggs.

success_outcomes.text: From a ledge above the patrol, many fledglings leap into the air. A sudden gust of wind sends some crashing into a low part of the cliff. Many tumble off, but a few limp bodies are caught on the rocks. p_l instructs {PRONOUN/p_l/poss} patrol to find a way to climb down. That's a feast for the taking.

r_c spots a lone egg in an unattended kelp nest, but as {PRONOUN/r_c/subject} {VERB/r_c/clamber/clambers} over, wingbeats buffet and a huge gannet lands right on it. p_l and {PRONOUN/p_l/poss} Clanmates react quickly, backing r_c up. r_c distracts the gannet, and p_l pounces, sinking {PRONOUN/p_l/poss} teeth into the back of its neck. It writhes and struggles, then lies still. That piece of fresh-kill is so big, r_c and p_l have to carry it together!
